objective: Follow the internal-AI recommended Test0-Test3 path to isolate whether MMAPI/NvBufSurface/CUDA corruption is in VIC round-trip, full-frame CUDA copy, integer translate, or EGL writeback.

entry_context.project_positioning: Jetson Orin NX heterogeneous video compute and device-side dataflow optimization, with EIS as the representative workload.
entry_context.previous_negative_result: cuda_affine_mmapi_diagnostic_v1 showed identity CUDA kernel output is readable, but translate/affine random sampling over the current EGL-mapped pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch tears or corrupts output.
entry_context.internal_ai_guidance: Do not mix CPU NvBufSurfaceSync rules with CUDA EGLImage path. Start from pure VIC round-trip, then dual-surface CUDA full-frame copy with separate Y/UV kernels, then integer translate, then optional cudaMallocPitch intermediate.
entry_context.current_question: Can a simpler dual-surface NV12 path establish a clean full-frame CUDA copy and integer translate before returning to affine warp?

frozen_variables: No accepted CUDA warp claim until visual review passes
Stop on tearing, green output, unreadable output, or unrelated visual content

result.decision: Test0 VIC round-trip and Test1 dual-surface CUDA full-frame copy pass, but Test2 dual-surface integer translate still tears. This isolates the failure to spatial random-sampling/remap over the current EGL-mapped pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch path, not to basic BL/PL transform, encode, or full-frame CUDA copy.

test0_vic_roundtrip.decision: base VIC round-trip is usable as dataflow sanity, with expected codec/color/edge drift

test1_cuda_copy.decision: dual-surface full-frame CUDA copy with separate Y/UV kernels is clean

test2_cuda_translate.decision: rejected; integer translate/random sampling still corrupts output

result.claim_boundary: Negative integration evidence for spatial CUDA warp over this EGL-mapped NV12_ER scratch path. Do not claim accepted CUDA warp, zero-copy, full-pipeline acceleration, or EIS quality improvement.

task_queue.title: Control-plane registration
task_queue.objective: Register the active contract and verify harness gates.
success_criteria: onboard reports this active task contract

task_queue.title: Test0 VIC round-trip
task_queue.objective: Run decode BL -> pitch-linear scratch -> block-linear encode without CUDA.
success_criteria: visual review has no tearing or color corruption
source-vs-output diff is near codec/dataflow floor

task_queue.title: Test1 CUDA full-frame copy
task_queue.objective: Run dual-surface CUDA copy with separate Y and UV kernels, no random sampling.
success_criteria: visual review has no tearing or color corruption
black-border p95 remains 0 or is classified

task_queue.title: Test2 integer translate
task_queue.objective: Run dual-surface integer translate with separate Y and UV kernels.
success_criteria: black border is explained by geometry, not block corruption
stop_reasons: integer translate still tears or shows unrelated content

task_queue.title: Test3 cudaMallocPitch intermediate
task_queue.objective: Only if Test2 is ambiguous, use CUDA-owned intermediate output and copy back to EGL output.
success_criteria: result distinguishes kernel correctness from EGL writeback correctness
visual review and timing are recorded

task_queue.title: Closeout
task_queue.objective: Write measured result and decide whether a later affine route is justified.
success_criteria: source/config/docs commit is prepared without results or secrets

forbidden_claims: accepted CUDA affine warp before Test2 visual pass
stop_reasons: Jetson SSH or device access unavailable
Test2 integer translate tears after Test1 passes
local and public references cannot identify a safe next route
